title: Bit Better Lantern
description: Makes the fire inside the lantern visible.
body:
This is a simple resource pack created with the idea of making the fire inside the lantern visible.
It changes the models of the lantern and the soul lantern.

> Due to updates to `pack.mcemeta` in version 1.21.9, the minimum supported range can now only be displayed as 1.20.1 ~ 1.21.+.  
> **This resource pack works properly on any version that includes lanterns, regardless of the version.**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ihhlwsvo/images/d913ecc15b39c0f525b3128449e88102210ee316.png)

## Known Issues

Because of how Minecraft's optimization works, if the ground is a solid block, the top part of the lantern interior may appear to be missing when viewed from inside.
